name: VR Education Holdings Plc
summary: VR Education Holdings Plc, through its subsidiary Immersive VR Education Limited, operates as a virtual/augmented reality software company in education and simulated training sector worldwide. The company offers ENGAGE, an online virtual learning and corporate training platform that provides educators and corporate trainers the tools they need to create their own content in virtual classrooms or virtual training environments. Its products also include 1943: Berlin Blitz, a VR education based on Second World War; Titanic VR, a solution that allows users to explore the shipwreck of RMS Titanic; Apollo 11 HD, a documentary on the events of 1969; RCSI medical training simulator designed for medical professionals and trainees, where users experience and simulate a traumatic scenario following a road traffic accident and work through the critical decisions; Shuttle Commander that allows you to take part in the hubble space telescope missions; and Raid on the Ruhr game application. VR Education Holdings Plc was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Waterford, Ireland.
